title: Hobby Life 0.35 Litre 10-Piece Plastic Square Multi-Box Set
features: Hobby Life 10 pc Square Multi-Box Set
Set of 10 x 0.35 Lt square storage boxes.
Highest quality plastic material used. Available only in transparent.
Food safe, dishwasher safe, microwave safe, deepfreeze safe
description: Product Description Part of our trademark Multi-Box range, this is a set of ten square storage boxes. The locking clips ensure a tight fitting lid keeps contents safe and secure. Made from the highest quality raw materials, this product is very durable and easy to clean. Box Contains 1 x 10 pc Hobby Life Square Multi-Box Set - 0.35 Lt
